failed_attempts.notes: Delta Cycle 80 - Testing after codebase reset. Stall threshold 14 regressed in new context (previous testing showed 14 optimal, but other parameters have changed).

failed_attempts.description: Reduced hub camp distance from 3 to 2 (-33%) to require agents to be closer to hub for camping
failed_attempts.notes: Delta Cycle 83 - Regression. Tighter distance requirement reduced hub camping effectiveness, particularly damaging on seed 46. Context matters: with HP threshold at 85 (not 100), distance 3 works better than 2.

failed_attempts.description: Reduced early retreat window from 150 to 120 steps (-20%)
failed_attempts.notes: Delta Cycle 84 - Regression. Shorter early retreat window reduced performance, particularly on seed 46. The longer 150-step window provides better early game flexibility in current context.

last_improvement.description: Reduced hub camp HP threshold from 100 to 85 (-15%) for faster early expansion
last_improvement.notes: Delta Cycle 82 - Good improvement. Less conservative hub camping allows earlier expansion while maintaining safety. Consistent gains across all seeds. New baseline: 16.37.
